svg.aria-label: Sheet Music for "Brose and Butter + Cuzle Together"
svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "Brose and Butter + Cuzle Together"

text.tspan: Source: Bonnie Rideout - Scottish Fire (2000) and
Alasdair Fraser and Natalie Haas - Fire & Grace (2004).
Notes: Bonnie plays this on the viola and it sounds awesome. I've transposed it up a fifth to work
on the fiddle. Another interesting thing is that she switches between A dorian (with a C natural)
- which seems to be the standard - and mixolydian (C sharp). She combines B&B with Cuzle
Together, another slipjig also in Amix (as well as Elsie Marly, but I'll leave that out for now).
This is supplemented with a version in Edor by Fraser and Haas, with a nice B-part.
